summary: Comprehensive testing of Email and Due-Date Warning features for Graupner Suite (Iteration 8). All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: Dashboard due warnings (amber/red), DocumentPreview email dialog, Mahnwesen email button, SMTP email sending.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/invoices/due-soon returns 200 with list of invoices due within 3 days
Backend: Due-soon invoices have days_until_due field
Backend: POST /api/invoices/check-due returns 200 with due_soon, overdue, notifications_sent counts
Backend: Check-due updates overdue invoices to 'Überfällig' status
Backend: POST /api/email/document/invoice/{id} sends invoice PDF via SMTP email successfully
Backend: POST /api/email/document/quote/{id} sends quote PDF via SMTP email successfully
Backend: POST /api/email/document/invalid/{id} returns 400 for invalid doc type
Backend: POST /api/email/document/invoice/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: POST /api/email/dunning/{id} sends dunning PDF via SMTP email successfully
Backend: POST /api/email/dunning/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: GET /api/invoices/overdue returns 200 with list of overdue invoices
Backend: Overdue invoices have days_overdue and dunning_level fields
Backend: Email document endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Email dunning endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Due-soon endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Check-due endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)
Frontend: Dashboard shows red overdue warning banner '4 Rechnung(en) überfällig!'
Frontend: Dashboard overdue warning has 'Mahnwesen' button linking to /invoices
Frontend: Invoices page has 'Mahnwesen' tab with badge showing overdue count (4)
Frontend: Mahnwesen tab shows overdue invoices with days_overdue, Mahnstufe, action buttons
Frontend: Mahnwesen tab shows email button (Mail icon) for invoices with dunning_level > 0
Frontend: DocumentPreview has 'E-Mail' button in header
Frontend: Email dialog opens with to_email, subject, message fields and Send button
Frontend: Email dialog successfully sends invoice via SMTP (toast: 'Rechnung per E-Mail gesendet')
Frontend: Quote preview also has 'E-Mail' button for sending quotes via email
critical_code_review_comments: SMTP email integration is REAL and working (not mocked) - uses secure.emailsrvr.com:465 SSL
Email endpoints properly require authentication via token parameter
Due-soon endpoint correctly filters invoices due within 3 days with days_until_due field
Check-due endpoint properly updates overdue invoice status to 'Überfällig'
DocumentPreview component correctly shared across quotes, orders, and invoices with email functionality
Mahnwesen email button only shows for invoices with dunning_level > 0 (correct behavior)
Dashboard due warnings use correct color coding: amber for due-soon, red for overdue
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: 4 overdue invoices, 0 due-soon invoices, 1 invoice with dunning_level=3 (Letzte Mahnung)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email and due-date warning features fully tested and working. Key endpoints: GET /api/invoices/due-soon (invoices due within 3 days), POST /api/invoices/check-due (triggers push notifications, updates status), POST /api/email/document/{type}/{id} (sends document PDF via SMTP), POST /api/email/dunning/{id} (sends dunning PDF via SMTP). SMTP is REAL (not mocked) using secure.emailsrvr.com:465 SSL with service24@tischlerei-graupner.de. Frontend: Dashboard shows amber (due-soon) and red (overdue) warning banners, DocumentPreview has email dialog, Mahnwesen tab has email button for dunned invoices.

smtp_configuration.status: WORKING - emails sent successfully during testing
